name: Safar - Property Rentals India
subtitle: Book Homes, PGs, Hotels & More
description:
Safar is India's property rental marketplace connecting travelers with unique stays and helping property owners earn from their spaces.

FOR TRAVELERS:
- Search homes, apartments, PGs, hotels, heritage havelis, hill station retreats & more
- Book nightly, monthly or hourly stays
- Explore 28 discovery categories: Hill Stations, Beach Houses, Heritage Havelis, Farmstays & more
- Pay securely via UPI, cards, net banking through Razorpay
- Leave reviews and help the community
- Save favorites and get personalized recommendations
- AI-powered smart search with natural language

FOR HOSTS:
- List your property in minutes with our guided wizard
- Manage bookings, calendars, and earnings from your dashboard
- Set flexible pricing: per night, per month, or per hour
- Track analytics, occupancy rates, and revenue
- KYC verification for trust and safety
- Safar Star Host badge for top-rated hosts

KEY FEATURES:
- 5 languages: English, Hindi, Tamil, Bengali, Marathi
- Secure authentication: Phone OTP, Email, Google Sign-In
- Real-time messaging between hosts and guests
- Push notifications for bookings and updates
- Aashray: Free listings for NGO shelters

Safar - Your journey starts here.
promotionalText: Find your perfect stay across India - homes, PGs, hotels & unique properties
